name: Bgsu Student Recreation Center
description: Bgsu Student Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Bowling Green, OH. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Bowling Green Community Center
description: Bowling Green Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Bowling Green, OH. There are 4 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to locker rooms, restrooms, and water. A membership is required to play.
open_play_schedule: occasional interruptions from Ohio National Guard to use three of the courts for a day.

name: Northwood Community Center
description: Northwood Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Northwood, OH. There are 4 indoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like trainers or lessons, lights, locker rooms, restrooms, and youth programming.
fees: Fee required — Fee required for non-members

name: Perrysburg Fort Meigs YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Perrysburg Fort Meigs YMCA in Perrysburg, OH! There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Perrysburg Recreation Park
description: Perrysburg Recreation Park is a place to play pickleball in Perrysburg, OH. There are 10 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: Rossford Recreation Center
description: Rossford Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Rossford, OH. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: The Welch Family Pickleball Complex
description: Come play pickleball at The Welch Family Pickleball Complex in Perrysburg, OH! There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Toledo Pickleball Club Courts
description: Toledo Pickleball Club Courts is a place to play pickleball in Rossford, OH. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play.
fees: Members only — $25 per year membership required
